Properties near Cantiague Park and throughout Hicksville's established residential neighborhoods are particularly susceptible to squirrel intrusions, especially during fall nesting season when these animals seek warm shelter in attics and crawl spaces.

faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Hicksville typically costs between $900 and $2,500, depending on the size of the infestation, number of entry points, extent of damage, and accessibility of affected areas. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, and basic repairs. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes for all Hicksville properties.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have squirrels in my Hicksville attic?
faqs.answer: Common signs include scratching or scurrying sounds in the attic during early morning or evening hours, visible droppings, chewed wood or wires, damaged insulation, and entry holes around roof edges or soffits. You may also notice squirrels entering and exiting your roofline. Our Hicksville technicians can perform a thorough inspection to confirm squirrel activity.

faqs.question: Are squirrel removal methods humane in Hicksville?
faqs.answer: Yes, Best Pest Control NYC uses only humane, legal squirrel removal methods in Hicksville. We employ live traps and one-way exclusion doors that allow squirrels to exit but not re-enter. All methods comply with New York State wildlife regulations, and we never use poisons or lethal traps for squirrel removal.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Hicksville home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service throughout Hicksville and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-7 days depending on the number of squirrels, though exclusion and repair work may take an additional 1-2 weeks to fully squirrel-proof your property and prevent future infestations.
